messages.content: {"2":"","UserId":"4e6dc755-3acf-48f9-961b-bb5a214343a8","Status":"Analyzed","Type":"Lab Report","promptvalue":"You are a medical document classification assistant.  Analyze the uploaded file carefully and classify it into exactly ONE of the following categories:  - Lab reports - Wearables - Health records - Patient intake - Encounter notes  Instructions: - Read the full document content. - Determine the single best matching category. - Return ONLY the category name. - Do not provide explanations, confidence scores, JSON, formatting, or extra text. - Output must exactly match one of the category names above.","isfilesavevalue":"yes","":"","doumentupload":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216421763718728Lab%20results%20M_Redacted.pdf","Notes":"","doumentupload_name":"Lab results M_Redacted.pdf","doumentupload_url":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216421763718728Lab%20results%20M_Redacted.pdf","createdby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","createddate":"2026-05-28T10:38:08.577Z","updatedby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","updateddate":"2026-05-28T10:38:08.577Z","gocameomodel":"PatientDocument","id":"2ad8fd69-f3e7-4050-8707-0c228b8085dc","createdate":"2026-05-28T10:38:31.2578847+00:00","_rid":"xqw0APUgK5LoBQAAAAAAAA==","_self":"dbs/xqw0AA==/colls/xqw0APUgK5I=/docs/xqw0APUgK5LoBQAAAAAAAA==/","_etag":"\"0000bf22-0000-0700-0000-6a181b270000\"","_attachments":"attachments/","_ts":1779964711,"aiagents":["Vitals Analyzer"],"highlightDataCard":[]}
